title: Wither Storm Sickness Shader
description: Adds Pinky G. Rocket's "Withered Filter" shader when the player has wither sickness, comes with a photosensitivity mode.
body:
### This datapack applies Pinky G. Rocket's "Withered Filter" shader when the player has wither sickness, also comes with a photosensitive mode.

****
This datapack requires

[Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod/versions?g=1.20.1)

[Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure/versions?g=1.20.1)

[Withered Filter (Not Hosted On Modrinth)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/withered-filter)

****
Known Issues:

Shader has to be reapplied every second, this can have performance impacts and obnoxious stutters, I don't know how to fix this.

Shader is removed temporarily when changing perspectives.
